title: Reimagined GUI (Dark)
body:
# Reimagined GUI - Dark

[![Unique Dark on Modrinth](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/modrinth@2x.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimaginedguidark)
[![Unique Dark on CurseForge](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/curseforge@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/reimaginedguidark)
[![amongstreality on Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/patreon@2x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![amongstreality on Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/compact/bmc@2x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

Replaces every container in the game, changes hotbar, hearts and armor icons.

> If you're looking for the Light version you can find it here [Reimagined GUI - Light](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimaginedguilight)

## You can support me and my projects here

[![Patreon](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/patreon@3x.png?raw=true)](https://www.patreon.com/c/AmongstReality)
[![Buy Me a Coffee](https://github.com/AmongstReality/amongstrealitys-badges/blob/main/labeled/bmc@3x.png?raw=true)](https://buymeacoffee.com/amongstreality)

## Mod support

- [Backslot](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backslot)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)
- [Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)
- [Inventorio](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventorio)
- [MidnightControls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols)
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [Vanilla Notebook](https://modrinth.com/mod/notebook)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Metal Barrels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/metal-barrels/files)

<summary>Terms of use</summary>

Author AmongstReality

Links to pages of the author on different platforms:

- [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/amongstreality/)

When you can use my assets:

- In public Modpacks on Modrinth/CurseForge.
- If you want to add mod support as an addon for the resource pack. If you do that, you have to add clear credit that
  includes links to the original resource pack.
- Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

When you can **NOT** use my assets:

- Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace.
- Locking behind a paywall (e.g. Patreon).
- Distribution of original/modified assets on any platforms.

Links to the resource pack's pages on different platforms:

- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/reimaginedguidark)
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimaginedguidark)

</details>
